first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are substantively identical. Both assign the same score (4/10) and provide the same core reasoning: the candidate has strong general engineering and tooling experience but lacks the specific Java/Kotlin/Spring expertise required for the role. The differences in wording between the two versions are minor rephrasings and fall well within the bounds of normal run-to-run variation. There is no language in the variant that keys off the location change from Berlin to Bucharest.
